rows.label: qev027005_MSG0005
rows.name:
I ate a liver-lover pizza loaded
with liver, and my blood recharge
is complete, dawayo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_MSG0006
rows.name:
How are things on your end,
dawayo? Did you beat up the
guy who shot me, dawayo? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_MSG0007
rows.name:
I won't be able to repair the ship
in peace like this, dawayo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_MSG0008
rows.name:
Hurry up and find the whereabouts
of the guy who shot me and
knock him down, dawayo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_MSG0009
rows.name: Welcome back, dawayo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_MSG0010
rows.name:
I heard everything, but... you should
report to Bihabba first, dawayo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_MSG0011
rows.name:
The shot came from the northwest,
dawayo! The enemy is definitely hiding
out in the Nightglow Forest, dawayo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_MSG0012
rows.name:
Hurry up and defeat the guy
who shot me twice, dawayo~! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_MSG0013
rows.name:
I'm so mad, I'm so mad,
I'm so mad, dawayo~! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_MSG0014
rows.name:
I absolutely won't let it
end like this, dawayo~! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_MSG0015
rows.name: Oh my, welcome back, dawayo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_MSG0016
rows.name: You finally came back, dawayo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_MSG0017
rows.name:
How's my pizza money
coming along, dawayo? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_JNK0030
rows.name: Deliver[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_SEL0031
rows.name:
Hand over 500,000G for
pizza money to Heradot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_JNK0040
rows.name: Keep[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_SEL0041
rows.name: Do not hand it over yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_MSG0018
rows.name: Wow, wow, good job! Good job, dawayo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_MSG0019
rows.name:
With this, I won't have to worry about pizza money
until I die, dawayo. Or rather, I'll probably be killed
by the pizza and still have change left, dawayo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_MSG0020
rows.name:
But that's a kind of happiness
in itself, dawayo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_MSG0021
rows.name:
Well, thanks to me putting my body
on the line, this dangerous area
has become peaceful too... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_MSG0022
rows.name:
And I get to be in pizza heaven,
so it feels like everything
wrapped up perfectly, dawayo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_MSG0023
rows.name:
I won't forget that your hard work
lies behind this happiness, dawayo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_MSG0024
rows.name:
I'll say it once more:
good job, dawayo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_MSG0025
rows.name:
...Now then. First, my three meals for today, plus
snacks, plus a late-night meal, plus some for unexpected
guests, and some to take out for emergencies. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_MSG0026
rows.name:
I'll go buy 10 meals' worth of pizza in
total, dawayo~. Ah, maybe I should treat
myself and have them delivered, dawayo~. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_MSG0027
rows.name:
Aahn, so happy~. Ascending to pizza heaven, dawayo~!
I will not accept any opinions that say it's weird
to ascend when I'm already in heaven, dawayo~! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_MSG0028
rows.name: Dawa-dawayo~~~! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_MSG0029
rows.name:
I'm so mad, I'm so mad! I'm
absolutely starving, dawayo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_MSG0030
rows.name:
Hurry up and bring me my
pizza money, dawayo---!! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_MSG0031
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—Wait, you don't have
enough money, dawayo!? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027005_MSG0032
rows.name:
500,000G for a lifetime's worth of
pizza as consolation money! Hurry
up and earn it, dawayo-----! [ST:wait ]
